MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-02-2017 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING. ZACHARY TOLSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. KELLY COLLINS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36. THE TRIAL DATE IS FEB-05-2018 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE LAST DAY PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 36(F) IS MAR-02-2018. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 2/1/18. SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS SHALL BE BROUGHT ON REGULAR NOTICE PURSUANT TO THE RELEVANT PROVISIONS OF THE CCP, UNLESS THE PARTIES STIPULATE OTHERWISE. TIME TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY NOT YET SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY ALREADY SERVED ARE DUE 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING OR BY THE DATE DETERMINED BY THE CCP, WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 1/19/18. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 2/2/18. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, SUCH MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA E-MAIL OR LETTER. IT SHALL OCCUR IN PERSON OR VIA TELEPHONE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
